title: Abyssbound
description: a mod that adds new biomes, mobs, bosses and structures based of the void
body:
**This mod is under the DarkMax Mod license, read before distribution**

(This mod is currently not being activley developed as I'm focusing on eternalink, my youtube Series, but I will come back to this)

# ![Abyssbound title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be59d1a9cc841e3ac6a38b981c356840ec5b4e2c.png)

Abyssbound adds brand-new biomes and a dimension called Abyssbound Depths — a lost realm of voidbound monsters, equiptment which are more than just for damage and protection and lore lost in the fog. Designed for players seeking eerie atmosphere, custom boss fights, new mechanics, new materials, blocks to decorate with and much new content.

**Features**
New Dimension – Abyssbound Depths
A dark and unsettling realm with many contrasting biomes, voidful resources and a layered lore-based ecosystem. But it just scratches the surface of how dangerous the real Void can be (the Void will be added in "The Void" expansion of this mod)

Main Boss: – Gravorax,
A terrifying, multi-phase boss summoned after breaking its seal.

**Bosses:**
- Chorvax - A giant crab creature which houses inside the Chintinhold Bastion.
- Fodravax - A Blazezard turned "god" sealed off in its throne room.
- Voltavax - The boss for the storm subtheme (not even designed yet)

![The main Abyssbound Bosses' silhouettes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/170199e337f77879cdf226883c0f39b8d7738d5d.png)
  
**Mini Bosses:**
- Oblivious Watcher - drops one of the most valuable resources of the mod, the Voideye.
- Nullform_Assasin - drops a resource to make powerful weapons like the Shrowdkiller.
- Fallen Vortex - A boss that drops The pure vortex core used to craft double jump boots.
  
**Mobs**
- Voidpiercer – Fast ranged entity that harasses the player in packs.
- Failed Construct – Failed remnant of a forgotten guardian.
- Voidlurker - A creature which spawns at night, always alone.
- Crabbling - A hostile crab found in Aetherswamps, its shell can be used to make Armor pieces effective to use in Water.
- Shroomlurker - A mob which camouflages itself as a Mushroom.
- Ashhopper - A species living in the blazes of the Abyss, trying to maintain their civilisation while fighting against predators

**Crafting Materials & Progression**
- Voidshards: Can be used to craft weapons, tools, or items.
- Voideye: the most powerful and important resource of the mod.
- Nullcrystal: a crystal found in geodes which can be used to brew antivoiding potions.

join the discord Server for Support and to report Bugs

**Future plans:**
- New Biomes, strucutres, creature sounds, bosses and advanced Visual update
- New crafting/upgrading system with void rituals

**Planned Expansions: (expansions work like dlcs that will be added after the main mod is finished)**
- Cruel judgement (Nether biomes, new mobs that get stronger the more Void Creatures you have killed...) 
- Celestials (Another dimension high above, contrasting the abyss, will go more in dephts of the creation of the Abyss and which role the celestials played in it)
- The Void (Adding harder Versions of the main bosses, once defeated grant the player a dimension even deeper than the abyssbound depths, new challanging bosses and more)

**Credits to Lyno for the Voidfloater and Chorvax**, aswell as **concepts for mobs** like the shroomling and Crabling and **some textures for blocks and items**

**If** you want to **support me in any way**, go to my **tiktok account @dev__dark**, where I also make **updates on the development of this mod**
